h12c62c2dg6a8ag44ceg9150g8f7679e6a216: Hear that? Someone's fighting the gnolls! We should help!
h108ab332gecc8g48b2ga0d3g14b2b5d97cf4: Don't be a fool, lad. Shut your mouth, and keep your head down.
h047a12d4gaa62g43f0g8728g50594f7fc7ba: Leave the heroics to them that don't value their own skin.
h534e3c14g230fg441fgb978g8586b4eb4422: Oh, gods. They've found fresh prey.
